translations.en: O! Hisham indeed al'aql was pleased baldwn from the worldly life with wisdom and did not is pleased baldwn from wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm O! Hisham indeed al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins and trk the worldly life from alfdl and trk sins from alfrd O! Hisham indeed al'aql nzr to the worldly life and to its people f'lm that she/it not tnal except balmshqh and nzr to the Hereafter f'lm that she/it not tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting O! Hisham indeed al'qla' zhdwa in the worldly life and rghbwa in the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh and the Hereafter talbh and mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh and who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life and his Hereafter O! Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal and rahh the heart from alhsd and safety in the religion flytdr' to of Allah 'z and jl in msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him and who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient and who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.ur: اے Hisham بے شک al'aql was pleased baldwn سے the worldly life with wisdom اور did not is pleased baldwn سے wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm اے Hisham بے شک al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins اور trk the worldly life سے alfdl اور trk sins سے alfrd اے Hisham بے شک al'aql nzr طرف the worldly life اور طرف its people f'lm that she/it نہیں tnal except balmshqh اور nzr طرف the Hereafter f'lm that she/it نہیں tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting اے Hisham بے شک al'qla' zhdwa میں the worldly life اور rghbwa میں the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh اور the Hereafter talbh اور mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh اور who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life اور his Hereafter اے Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal اور rahh the heart سے alhsd اور safety میں the religion flytdr' طرف of Allah 'z اور jl میں msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him اور who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient اور who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.tr: ey Hisham muhakkak al'aql was pleased baldwn -den the worldly life with wisdom ve did not is pleased baldwn -den wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm ey Hisham muhakkak al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins ve trk the worldly life -den alfdl ve trk sins -den alfrd ey Hisham muhakkak al'aql nzr -e the worldly life ve -e its people f'lm that she/it değil tnal except balmshqh ve nzr -e the Hereafter f'lm that she/it değil tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting ey Hisham muhakkak al'qla' zhdwa içinde the worldly life ve rghbwa içinde the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh ve the Hereafter talbh ve mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh ve who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life ve his Hereafter ey Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal ve rahh the heart -den alhsd ve safety içinde the religion flytdr' -e of Allah 'z ve jl içinde msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him ve who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient ve who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.fa: ای Hisham به درستی al'aql was pleased baldwn از the worldly life with wisdom و did not is pleased baldwn از wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm ای Hisham به درستی al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins و trk the worldly life از alfdl و trk sins از alfrd ای Hisham به درستی al'aql nzr به سوی the worldly life و به سوی its people f'lm that she/it نه tnal except balmshqh و nzr به سوی the Hereafter f'lm that she/it نه tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting ای Hisham به درستی al'qla' zhdwa در the worldly life و rghbwa در the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh و the Hereafter talbh و mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh و who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life و his Hereafter ای Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal و rahh the heart از alhsd و safety در the religion flytdr' به سوی of Allah 'z و jl در msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him و who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient و who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.id: wahai Hisham sesungguhnya al'aql was pleased baldwn dari the worldly life with wisdom dan did not is pleased baldwn dari wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm wahai Hisham sesungguhnya al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins dan trk the worldly life dari alfdl dan trk sins dari alfrd wahai Hisham sesungguhnya al'aql nzr kepada the worldly life dan kepada its people f'lm that she/it tidak tnal except balmshqh dan nzr kepada the Hereafter f'lm that she/it tidak tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting wahai Hisham sesungguhnya al'qla' zhdwa di dalam the worldly life dan rghbwa di dalam the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh dan the Hereafter talbh dan mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh dan who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life dan his Hereafter wahai Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal dan rahh the heart dari alhsd dan safety di dalam the religion flytdr' kepada of Allah 'z dan jl di dalam msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him dan who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient dan who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.bn: হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই al'aql was pleased baldwn থেকে the worldly life with wisdom এবং did not is pleased baldwn থেকে wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins এবং trk the worldly life থেকে alfdl এবং trk sins থেকে alfrd হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই al'aql nzr দিকে the worldly life এবং দিকে its people f'lm that she/it না tnal except balmshqh এবং nzr দিকে the Hereafter f'lm that she/it না tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই al'qla' zhdwa মধ্যে the worldly life এবং rghbwa মধ্যে the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh এবং the Hereafter talbh এবং mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh এবং who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life এবং his Hereafter হে Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal এবং rahh the heart থেকে alhsd এবং safety মধ্যে the religion flytdr' দিকে of Allah 'z এবং jl মধ্যে msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him এবং who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient এবং who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.es: oh Hisham ciertamente al'aql was pleased baldwn de the worldly life with wisdom y did not is pleased baldwn de wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm oh Hisham ciertamente al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins y trk the worldly life de alfdl y trk sins de alfrd oh Hisham ciertamente al'aql nzr hacia the worldly life y hacia its people f'lm that she/it no tnal except balmshqh y nzr hacia the Hereafter f'lm that she/it no tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting oh Hisham ciertamente al'qla' zhdwa en the worldly life y rghbwa en the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh y the Hereafter talbh y mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh y who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life y his Hereafter oh Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal y rahh the heart de alhsd y safety en the religion flytdr' hacia of Allah 'z y jl en msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him y who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient y who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.fr: ô Hisham certes al'aql was pleased baldwn de the worldly life with wisdom et did not is pleased baldwn de wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm ô Hisham certes al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins et trk the worldly life de alfdl et trk sins de alfrd ô Hisham certes al'aql nzr vers the worldly life et vers its people f'lm that she/it non tnal except balmshqh et nzr vers the Hereafter f'lm that she/it non tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting ô Hisham certes al'qla' zhdwa dans the worldly life et rghbwa dans the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh et the Hereafter talbh et mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh et who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life et his Hereafter ô Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal et rahh the heart de alhsd et safety dans the religion flytdr' vers of Allah 'z et jl dans msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him et who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient et who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.de: o Hisham wahrlich al'aql was pleased baldwn von the worldly life with wisdom und did not is pleased baldwn von wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm o Hisham wahrlich al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins und trk the worldly life von alfdl und trk sins von alfrd o Hisham wahrlich al'aql nzr zu the worldly life und zu its people f'lm that she/it nicht tnal except balmshqh und nzr zu the Hereafter f'lm that she/it nicht tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting o Hisham wahrlich al'qla' zhdwa in the worldly life und rghbwa in the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh und the Hereafter talbh und mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh und who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life und his Hereafter o Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal und rahh the heart von alhsd und safety in the religion flytdr' zu of Allah 'z und jl in msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him und who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient und who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.ru: о Hisham поистине al'aql was pleased baldwn из the worldly life with wisdom и did not is pleased baldwn из wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm о Hisham поистине al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins и trk the worldly life из alfdl и trk sins из alfrd о Hisham поистине al'aql nzr к the worldly life и к its people f'lm that she/it не tnal except balmshqh и nzr к the Hereafter f'lm that she/it не tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting о Hisham поистине al'qla' zhdwa в the worldly life и rghbwa в the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh и the Hereafter talbh и mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh и who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life и his Hereafter о Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal и rahh the heart из alhsd и safety в the religion flytdr' к of Allah 'z и jl в msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him и who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient и who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.zh: 啊 Hisham 确实 al'aql was pleased baldwn 从 the worldly life with wisdom 和 did not is pleased baldwn 从 wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm 啊 Hisham 确实 al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins 和 trk the worldly life 从 alfdl 和 trk sins 从 alfrd 啊 Hisham 确实 al'aql nzr 向 the worldly life 和 向 its people f'lm that she/it 不 tnal except balmshqh 和 nzr 向 the Hereafter f'lm that she/it 不 tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting 啊 Hisham 确实 al'qla' zhdwa 在 the worldly life 和 rghbwa 在 the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh 和 the Hereafter talbh 和 mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh 和 who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life 和 his Hereafter 啊 Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal 和 rahh the heart 从 alhsd 和 safety 在 the religion flytdr' 向 of Allah 'z 和 jl 在 msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him 和 who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient 和 who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
